title: Joe Stepenovitch
compiled_truth: Joe Stepenovitch is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-11 to 2002-03-18), Joe Stepenovitch sent 96 and received 991 emails, totalling 1087 interactions. Top correspondents: [Heather Kroll](people/heather-kroll) (23), [Linda Stepenovitch](people/linda-stepenovitch-bankofamerica) (9), [Jls](people/jls-fullenweider) (9), [Peter Makkai](people/peter-makkai) (7), [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (6).
